(Translated by Google)
A much-needed and pleasant rest stop along the route.

reviews.comment:
Todos los Servicios para el Automotor y para los Viajeros. Baños limpios. Autoservicio y Cafetería.

(Translated by Google)
All services for motorists and travelers. Clean restrooms. Drive-thru and cafeteria.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChRDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBMEtZNBAB

reviews.comment:
Lugar casi obligatorio de parada,  precios muy caros y servicio deficiente. (36 grados de temperatura y las heladeras con bebidas al natural).

(Translated by Google)
Almost a mandatory stop, very expensive prices and poor service. (36 degrees Celsius and the refrigerators have lukewarm drinks).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRczRfUFdBEAE

reviews.comment:
Cambian las dos cajas al mismo tiempo. Nadie te cobrs y se te enfria la comida

(Translated by Google)
They change both boxes at the same time. No one charges you, and your food gets cold.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURndjcyZWRBEAE
